programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Tulsa, Okla., detectives have little to go on when they find the naked body of an unknown homeless woman who was raped, strangled to death and thrown into a dumpster.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a popular young man is executed in broad daylight, Tulsa Homicide struggles to understand why one teen would kill another in cold blood.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a man is gunned down at an apartment complex, detectives run up against elusive witnesses and dead ends in their search to figure out who wanted him dead.

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, two young men are found murdered inside a car on a dark residential street; with no witnesses and few leads, the case stalls, until a teenage girl steps forward with information that leads to an arrest and a confession; but when the defense moves to suppress that statement before trial, the prosecution's case risks being dismantled.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: In this dramatic conclusion to a rapidly unfolding double homicide case, investigators are running out of time to locate a body and get the truth from a group of witnesses who may actually be in on the murders.

programme.title: Killer Investigations
programme.desc: In a peaceful Iowa town, farmer Ryan Cooper is found shot in his armchair in the middle of the night; his wife, a local hairdresser, and their family become the center of a tense investigation filled with secrets and explosive revelations.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Troopers in Arizona engage in a high-speed vehicle pursuit with spike strips; in Florida officers use pepper balls to subdue a suspect; when officers in Missouri receive a report involving an alleged gunshot victim, they arrive on scene to find something they didn't expect.
